calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Continued To Apr-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John E. O'Grady for petitioner Dannelle A. Sirrine

The Court stated that the issue raised by the petition is the effect of the disclaimer by the decedent's aunt, noting that the aunt's disclaimer would result in a distribution to her children unless they also disclaim the bequest. The Court cited Probate Code section 282(a) as providing that the disclaimant is treated as a predeceased heir, so that the bequest then passes to the disclaimant's heirs in her place. He inquired whether Mr. O'Grady preferred to submit the matter, or be given a continuance to address the Court's concerns. Mr. O'Grady stated that it made sense to continue the matter to try to see how the family widhed to proceed. The hearing on the petition was continued to April 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John O'Grady for Danielle Sirrine.

The First and Final Report of Administrator and Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to March 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to be given the Aunt's potential heirs.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Barrientos. Not reported.
